question_en: How is Bitcoin defined in this unit?
choices_en: As a monetary network with fixed supply and no central control
As a stock with an unusual payout structure
As a private bank ledger shared online
choices_ko: 고정 공급과 중앙 통제 부재를 가진 통화 네트워크로
explanation_en: Bitcoin is presented as a monetary network governed by rules rather than by a central issuing authority.
explanation_ko: 비트코인은 중앙 발행 기관이 아니라 규칙에 의해 움직이는 통화 네트워크로 제시된다.
